name: Gypsy Joker Motorcycle Club
description: The Gypsy Joker Motorcycle Club is a one-percenter motorcycle club founded in San Bernardino, California on April 1, 1956. It expanded internationally, gaining notoriety in Australia, the United States, Germany, and Norway. The club is known for its violent criminal activities, including drug trafficking, homicide, and arson.
